name: research-navigator
description: Local-first research roadmap tracker. Flat files, git-style branching graph, optional local AI.

scripts.test: node scripts/contracts.test.mjs && node scripts/research-doc.test.mjs && node scripts/research-domain.test.mjs && node scripts/research-actions.test.mjs && node scripts/research-project.test.mjs && node scripts/research-context.test.mjs && node scripts/research-export.test.mjs && node scripts/server-smoke.test.mjs && node scripts/roadmap.test.mjs && node scripts/timelineStatus.test.mjs && node scripts/preferences.test.mjs && node scripts/selection.test.mjs && node scripts/graphView.test.mjs
scripts.research:preflight: git status --short --branch && git diff --stat && node --env-file-if-exists=.env.local scripts/research-preflight.mjs
